programme.title: NCT DREAM The 4th Album 'DREAMSCAPE' Playlist
programme.desc: 5. No Escape 11. Rains in HeavenNCT DREAM's 4th full-length album 「DREAMSCAPE」 follows their previous release 「DREAM( )SCAPE」, portraying the group's second journey as they break away from a dark, desensitized reality in search of an ideal dreamlike space. 1. INTRO : DREAMSCAPE 7. YOU 4. i hate fruits 6. Best of Me 10. Off The Wall 3. Flying Kiss [Track List] 8. Heavenly 2. When I'm With You The title 「DREAMSCAPE」 signifies a long-awaited, dreamlike landscape and world, capturing the excitement and freedom of youth within this utopian realm. Across 11 tracks, a dynamic storyline unfolds like a fairytale, vividly portraying the radiant moments of youth in a dramatic way. 9. Night Poem

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.”

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Promise' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics, written by DOYOUNG, capture the feelings he couldn't easily express as his love grew deeper. Even if the confession comes late, it delivers a sincerity and emotional resonance stronger than any other words.The title track “Promise” is an impressive ballad that begins with a minimal piano melody and gradually builds emotional depth as strings are added in the latter half.

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)' Live Clip
programme.desc: Layered over a jazz guitar melody, the sweet vocals blend together like a conversation, conveying a lovely sense of fluttering excitement. The track “Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)” is an R&B ballad that depicts a moment of exchanging feelings through the sound of a whistle. With Belle participating as a featuring artist and harmonizing with DOYOUNG, the synergy between the two elevates the charm of the song even further.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: EXO has returned with a new trailer. At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is the duo HOONS! HOONS is composed of two musicians of the same age - vocalist Lee Sang-hoon and keyboardist Lee Jong-hoon. They met each other in university and then made their debut together in 2016 with the single To You I Am. Thanks to their soft mellow music and sweet lyrics the duo mesmerized the public immediately and they are certainly making their way in the music industry building their fanbase and having their music featured in various TV shows. In this episode HOONS performs I C U Can't hide a love and many others to showcase the essence of their musicality. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet the duo!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is the Korean father of city pop - Kim Hyun-chul! Kim Hyun-chul made his debut in 1989 with the album Kim Hyun-chul Vol. 1. With all songs composed written and arranged by the artist himself he pleasantly surprised the ears and souls of listeners with his jazz-infused music and eventually brought a new wave to the Korean music scene. Throughout his 32-year career Kim Hyun-chul gained much critical acclaim and commercial success earning the nickname the father of Korean city pop. Also his debut album was chosen as one of the All-Time 100 Greatest Albums of Korean Popular Music thanks to the influence it had had on the Korean music scene. Then in 2019 Kim Hyun-chul resumed his career after a break of 13 years and in celebration of the 30th anniversary of his debut. The album garnered much attention not only because of the anticipation of fans and critics but also because he brought an array of Korea's leading artists along with him. His return coincided with the resurgence of city pop in Korea and he's back once again 2 years later in 2021 to continue with the momentum. Part I of Kim Hyun-chul's performance on I'm LIVE features What's the Matter? City Breeze & Love Song and Tears of Joy. Tune in to the show and meet the legend!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Kim Hyun-chul on I'm LIVE - Part II. Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is the Korean father of city pop - Kim Hyun-chul! Kim Hyun-chul made his debut in 1989 with the album Kim Hyun-chul Vol. 1. With all songs composed written and arranged by the artist himself he pleasantly surprised the ears and souls of listeners with his jazz-infused music and eventually brought a new wave to the Korean music scene. Throughout his 32-year career Kim Hyun-chul gained much critical acclaim and commercial success earning the nickname the father of Korean city pop. Also his debut album was chosen as one of the All-Time 100 Greatest Albums of Korean Popular Music thanks to the influence it had had on the Korean music scene. Then in 2019 Kim Hyun-chul resumed his career after a break of 13 years and in celebration of the 30th anniversary of his debut. The album garnered much attention not only because of the anticipation of fans and critics but also because he brought an array of Korea's leading artists along with him. His return coincided with the resurgence of city pop in Korea and he's back once again 2 years later in 2021 to continue with the momentum. Part II of Kim Hyun-chul's performance features So Nice!! Drive In My Neighborhood and Fall of the Moon. Tune in to the show and meet the legend!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is top-notch singer Jung yup! Jung yup made his debut in 2003 as a member of the R&B group Brown Eyed Soul. Composed of four highly talented vocalists the group impressed the ears and souls of the public immediately. Then in 2007 Jung yup performed the song Nothing Better at one concert which went viral on the internet and attracted a lot of attention laying the foundation for his popularity. After a long long break this artist announced his much-anticipated return in April this year. Since then he has released two singles full of love and romance Waltz For You and DRIVE to melt listeners' hearts once again. In this episode Jung yup performs his new songs Waltz For You and DRIVE his all-time greatest hit Nothing Better and more. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this wonderful vocalist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is the duo HOONS! HOONS is composed of two musicians of the same age - vocalist Lee Sang-hoon and keyboardist Lee Jong-hoon. They met each other in university and then made their debut together in 2016 with the single To You I Am. Thanks to their soft mellow music and sweet lyrics the duo mesmerized the public immediately and they are certainly making their way in the music industry building their fanbase and having their music featured in various TV shows. In this episode HOONS performs I C U Can't hide a love and many others to showcase the essence of their musicality. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet the duo!

programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks to Christine Lagarde about Europe's fragility, rising populism and how she stays calm in crises from global shocks to political pressure.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: Alexander Stubb,
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua visits Finland, where the threat from neighboring Russia looms large she speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future. (S1 E01)

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Former U.K. Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in strongmen.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer With Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits South Korea to explore how it became a cultural and tech superpower she trains with a Taekwondo black belt, learns kimchi secrets from a grandmaster and dives into pro gaming.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer With Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals why ancient Greece was the birthplace of so many big ideas she decodes the Parthenon's geometry, sails the Aegean with ancient tools and is swept up in a riotous festival.

programme.title: Australia v West Indies
programme.desc: Cricket Gold

programme.title: 2 Nations, 1 Obsession
programme.desc: In terms of rivalries in world sport, there is arguably none as fierce as that between the Australia and Indian cricket. This documentary explores the stories behind the remarkable 1986 Tied Test in Madras, the gripping final over bowled by Greg Matthews plus the remarkable feat that was Dean Jones' double hundred. Fast-forward 15 years and the 2001 series between the nations is widely regarded as one of the best series ever played. In particular, the dramatic Third Test where a plucky young off spinner named Harbhajan Singh ripped through Australia to take 15 wickets for the match, and lead India to victory. 2 Nations 1 Obsession isn't just an epic Cricket story – it's a tale of how two countries with such different DNA - can be brought together for the love of a game. Allan Border, Sunil Gavaskar, Greg Matthews, Adam Gilchrist, Ravi Shastri and Stuart Clark are just a few of the cricket legends who feature prominently in this film.

programme.title: Super Senses

programme.title: Sucked by Tiger Leeches!
programme.desc: Leeches attack in this jungle trek! Mark shows how tiger leeches feed and what it takes to remove them once they latch on.In the aftermath of wildfires, koalas need help. Coyote joins a rescue team in Australia to treat, care for, and rehome injured marsupials.

programme.title: Would You Enter the Dragon Infested Island?!
programme.desc: Would you explore an island crawling with giant reptiles? Coyote does, facing huge dragons, rough terrain, and epic surprises.Something from the deep clamps onto Mark. In this spine-tingling episode, he's bitten by a mysterious deep-sea creature.

programme.title: Sliced by a Spiny Lobster!
programme.desc: The spiny lobster's claws may look small, but one swipe slices skin. Coyote takes a cut and explains this crustacean's anatomy.Tarpon are giant, fast, and aggressive. Coyote gets up close—and briefly inside—during this wild feeding encounter in the water.

programme.title: Don't Touch! – Up Close with a Rattlesnake!
programme.desc: Coyote gets dangerously close to a rattlesnake. With fangs bared and rattles shaking, he shows what happens when you get too near.An island crawling with dragons? Coyote explores a real-life dragon-infested zone where giant lizards roam freely—and dangerously.

programme.title: Would You Survive This Obstacle Course Challenge?!
programme.desc: Can you survive this wilderness obstacle course? Coyote takes on a challenge of physical grit and wild surprises in this action-packed adventure.One of the most dangerous snakes alive, the black mamba is captured and relocated safely with Coyote's help. A heart-pounding rescue mission.

programme.title: Spitting Cobra vs. My Face!
programme.desc: Face to fangs—Coyote encounters a spitting cobra. He tests how accurate its venom aim is and how to respond to this rare defense tactic.Coyote participates in a controversial conservation procedure: trimming a rhino's horn. He explains the reasons, risks, and impact of the act.

programme.title: Burned by a Giant Fireworm!
programme.desc: The giant fireworm brings the burn—literally. Mark handles this bizarre sea creature and ends up with chemical irritation on his skin.Coyote explores a lost island, teeming with mystery. From rare creatures to haunting terrain, this wild place holds unexpected surprises.

programme.title: Coyote, Lexie, & Skye Compete for Prehistoric Gold!
programme.desc: Coyote and Mario are on the hunt for prehistoric shark teeth the size of your hand! Teaming up with real fossil experts—and world-record-breaking explorer Lexie Limitless—they're diving into the mud to see who can score the biggest megalodon treasure.

programme.title: Electric Eel Shocks Me Again... and Again!
programme.desc: Mark returns to the electric eel—and gets shocked again and again. This episode highlights electricity in nature and its incredible uses.500 fire ants. One arm. Coyote takes a sting challenge that pushes the limits of pain while explaining how fire ants swarm and attack.

programme.title: Attacked by Bloodsucking Parasites!
programme.desc: Bloodsucking bugs go on the attack! Coyote lets these parasites bite in real time to show how fast they latch and how to stop them.The echidna looks cute, but its spikes say otherwise. Mark handles this spiny Australian mammal and explains its strange biology.

programme.title: Stung by a Deadly Scorpion!
programme.desc: Mark takes on a deadly scorpion in this tense episode. With pincers and venom, the sting test gets real—and painful—fast.The centipede strikes back! Mark revisits one of his creepiest encounters to see if this many-legged predator will finally deliver a bite.

programme.title: Mini Bulls Don't Have Mini Horns!
programme.desc: They're tiny, they're horned, and they're tougher than they look. Coyote introduces us to mini bulls—small cattle with big personalities. Mark gets another jolt—this time on purpose—from an electric eel. He demonstrates how the animal uses electricity to navigate and defend.

programme.title: Did I Find a Murder Hornet in the USA?!
programme.desc: Could murder hornets be in the U.S.? Coyote investigates sightings and explains how to identify these massive, invasive insects.This ancient fish has long, needle-like teeth and a monstrous look. Coyote dives into its evolutionary history and predatory tactics.

programme.title: $10,000 Animal Challenge – Who Will Win?!
programme.desc: With a $10,000 prize on the line, Coyote and his crew take on a wild animal challenge to see who can find, catch, and identify the most species.Ten turtles in one day? Coyote takes on the shell-filled challenge with nets, patience, and muddy hands to see how many species he can spot.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Emilia Romagna is the culinary heart of Italy and Chef Michael Bonacini shows viewers how to make some of the region's most delicious dishes.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Renowned Chef Michael Bonacini takes viewers on a culinary tour of the Italian region of Trentino-Alto Adige without leaving his own kitchen.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Charming host Chef Michael Bonacini explores the mountainous region of Basilicata with a feast fit for any celebration. Beginning with an antipasto that caters to the region's southern heat, Michael stuffs crunchy sweet peppers with ripe tomatoes, savoury anchovies, and fresh oregano. Moving on to the primo, Michael cooks up a creamy Vermicelli Frittata. Using leftover pasta, he combines eggs with cheese, anchovies, and chili flakes for extra flavour to make a classic Basilicata dish. Michael cooks up Pollo Alla Potentina, a traditional meal from the Feast of Saint Gerard. This hearty chicken stew is sure to heat up your core, using hot peppers as the base of the meal. For his final dish, Michael combines the rich tastes of pomegranate, walnuts, and dark chocolate to create his unique Sweet Wheat Bowl.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini highlights the tiny region of Molise, exposing some of its best kept savoury secrets. Starting with a classic, Michael cooks up a delicious multi-layered Chicory Timbale, a pie filled with fresh chicory, ripe roma tomatoes, and sliced prosciutto. To crisp up the top of the pie, Michael tops his delicious dish with finely grated pecorino cheese and crunchy breadcrumbs. Next up, Michael's primo is a spicy Octopus in Purgatory. This tender, colourful, and sumptuous dish is sure to impress in both looks and taste! For his secondo, Michael cooks up a traditional Marinated Rabbit. Stewed in wine, tomatoes, and chilies, this rustic dish will have your guests asking for seconds. To finish, Michael whips up light and luscious Peaches and Cream Cookies. Filled with decadent cream, these round delights are refreshing and lighter-than-air - the perfect way to end a wholesome meal.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Delving into the cold mountainous region of Valle D'Aosta, Celebrity chef Michael Bonacini whips up a meal of four hearty dishes that are sure to warm up any chilly day. First up is Michael's antipasto of Wild Mushrooms and Lardo on Rye. Coated with rich, earthy mushrooms, buttery fontina cheese, and savoury cured pork, this decadent dish highlights a combination of iconic flavours from Valle D'Aosta. Next up is a twist on traditional pasta with Valle D'Aosta's unique Chestnut Fettucine topped with Sweet Pork and Earthy Cabbage. The secret to this dish? Chestnut flour to create a denser, sweeter, and nuttier pasta. For his secondo, Michael turns to the pride of the region, Fontina cheese, to fill his Stuffed Veal Cutlets. Luscious and rich, this dish is a burst of luxurious flavours in every bite. For his final dish, Michael shows his sweet side with a Crema di Cogne served with Valdostana Tile Cookies. The thin, crispy cookies with a hint of hazelnut dipped in a light chocolate cream are the perfect way to wrap up Michael's luxurious Valle D'Aosta meal.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: The popular region of Tuscany is known for its wines, cheeses, and gorgeous sights. Chef Michael Bonacini introduces us to Tuscany's fine cuisine with four of his favourite dishes. Michael draws attention to the importance of mushrooms in Tuscan culture with an antipasto: Many Mushroom soup. Warm, hearty, and full of earthy flavour, Michael tops this soup with fried sage leaves to combine comfort and crunch in a single bite. For his primo, Michael explores a Tuscan favourite - Lamb Ragu! Served over pici noodles, Michael's rich ragu is complemented by fresh, light herbs. Then, Michael serves up a Porchetta-Style Duck, a crispy and tender secondo. To bring his meal together, Michael ends with a smooth and decadent Creamy Coffee Custard any coffee fan will appreciate.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas uncovers the revolutionary spirit woven into the music of St. Croix, where sound has long served as a rallying cry for justice and identity. Through the powerful perspectives of Mada Nile, Ras Attitude, Ras Bach, the Ay-Ay Cultural Dancers, and Kevin Williams, this episode explores how artists have used music to confront oppression, celebrate resilience, and inspire change — from the island's historic struggles to its modern-day movements.

programme.title: COFFEE The Ultimate Language

programme.title: Virginia Beach

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: For this episode, Ben's planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: This time, Mike's planned 48 hours in New Mexico... And he's determined to show the guys as much of it as possible!! From the White Sands National Park, to Hatch, Santa Fe, Albuquerque and Taos! How do you think he'll get on??!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Finishing their Four Corners adventure, it's Barry's turn, and he's not exactly known for his organization skills! Watch as he takes the friends from Grand Junction to the Grand Mesa and on to Vail and Boulder... How will the guys judge him, and who will be the overall winner?!

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: The couple head to southwestern Oklahoma to climb Quartz Mountain but when Jason's confidence is shaken during a failed slab climb, Tayler realizes she may need to prepare to carry a larger load on their journey out west.

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Failed rock climbing, failed training...struggling marriage? When everything seems to have gone wrong on their road trip in Oklahoma, Tayler and Jason are faced with the question..."are we biting off more than we can chew?" as they head to Wyoming.

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason has attempted to climb the Grand Teton, located in Wyoming, three times before the couple's adventure out west. Will the fourth time be a charm? Or will life's unplanned moments present even greater challenges than Jason anticipated?

programme.title: Chef Swap At The Beach: Meat And Appetizer Duo
programme.desc: It's time to bring on the meats. Chef Mason tastes Meat Appetizer Duos from Chef Terry Flores of Rivertown Bistro and Chef Justin Feasel of Fire and Smoke. Both chefs go above and beyond to wow the judges with their carnivorous specials.
